description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a sprawling layout, surrounded by a wooden privacy fence and featuring a large driveway leading to a garage. The exterior walls are clad in a mix of light-colored siding and brick, with numerous large windows providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, lounge seating, and a circular hot tub, creating a luxurious outdoor living space. The roofline is a combination of gable and flat sections, adding architectural interest and variety. The landscaping is minimal but well-maintained, with small shrubs and planters accenting the perimeter. The house appears to have multiple entry points, including a prominent main entrance and sliding doors opening to the backyard.
description: A modern, single-story house with a mix of brick and siding, large windows, a fenced yard, and a backyard pool with patio seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, garage, and primary entrance with large windows and minimal landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick exterior, secondary entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, hot tub, patio furniture, and multiple sliding doors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and the full extent of the backyard amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, minimal steps, and is accentuated by large windows and a clean, open porch area.
